title: CRC-085 I Was Guided To A Hotel Room, Alone With A Concierge With Constricted Colossal Tits That Looks Skinny At A Glance, I Was Splayfully Invited To Ask If I Was Interested In The Entertainment World, And A Concierge With Super Masochistic Colossal Tits, And While I Was Saying Areyoareyo, I Made An AV Debut. M Concierge Yui Satonaka
overview: A hotel concierge who is scouted for stories about the entertainment world. Yui Satonaka is soaring when she hears about the entertainment world, and is deceived as being funny. If you think about it carefully, it's suspicious, but it's a woman's nature not to notice when she's being deceived. A documentary about a hotel concierge who ended up making her AV debut instead of making her debut in the entertainment world.
